history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A close-up, selfie-style portrait of a young man with wet, spiky black hair. He has dark eyes, prominent eyebrows, and a light stubble beard with a soul patch. The lighting is bright and natural, casting soft shadows on his face, highlighting the texture of his skin and hair. He is wearing a pink t-shirt with thin horizontal white stripes. The background is slightly out of focus, showing a light-colored wall and what appears to be a window or skylight with green-tinted glass and some structural elements. The overall mood is casual and candid, as if captured in a moment of everyday life. The color palette is dominated by the warm tones of his skin and the pink of his shirt, contrasted with the dark hair and the muted background. The style is realistic, with a focus on natural light and detail.
